text: Just had another customer call where they complained about the checkout losing their cart. Third one this week.
Anyone else seeing the dashboard take 10+ seconds to load? Enterprise customers are escalating.
BigRetail just threatened to switch to Amplitude if we don't fix checkout by their renewal. That's $48K ARR.
The mobile app crashed 3 times during my demo with a prospect. Lost the deal. We need the React Native rewrite ASAP.
Positive feedback from DataDriven — they love the new export feature. Said it saved them 2 hours per week.
TechFlow's SSO integration keeps failing. Kevin, can the identity team look at this? They renew in 3 weeks.
